resources.string: 1 digit is correct and in the right spot
1 digit is correct but in the wrong spot
2 digits are correct, 1 is in the right spot
2 digits are correct, 1 is in the right spot
2 digits are correct, both in right spots
2 digits are correct, both in wrong spots
3 digits are correct, all in right spots
3 digits are correct, all in wrong spots
3 digits are correct, 1 is in the right spot
3 digits are correct, 2 are in right spots
4 digits are correct, all in wrong spots
4 digits are correct, 1 is in the right spot
4 digits are correct, 2 are in right spots
1 digit is correct and in the right spot
1 digit is correct but in the wrong spot
2 digits are correct, both in wrong spots
2 digits are correct, both in wrong spots
2 digits are correct, 1 is in the right spot
2 digits are correct and both in right spots
3 digits are correct but all in wrong spots
3 digits are correct, 1 is in the right spot
You can do better! Try again!

plurals.name: share_score_message
plurals.item: I scored %1$d points in Number Detective! Used %2$d attempt in %3$s. Can you beat my score? 🎮
I scored %1$d points in Number Detective! Used %2$d attempts in %3$s. Can you beat my score? 🎮

resources.string: Examine hints to track down the secret code.
Use logic to eliminate impossible numbers.
Enter the correct sequence and win!

Welcome to the Field Operations. Evidence will be automatically incinerated when the timer expires. To resolve the case, you must crack the 3-layer encryption protocol. No digits repeat in the code, allowing for precise strategic elimination. Remember, this is more than a game—it is a cognitive reset protocol.
Manipulate the digits using the vertical synaptic cylinders. Swipe vertically or tap directly on the numbers to position your target combination within the central decryption zone.

Facing a logical deadlock? Access the field archive at any time by tapping the \'Interrogation\' zone in the top-right. All previous attempts and system feedback are logged here; utilize this data to eliminate impossible combinations.

If Assisted Mode is active, archival data is marked with neural color-coding:

• GREEN: Digit is correct and position is verified.
• YELLOW: Digit is correct but position is faulty.

These data points are designed to enhance your intuitive efficiency.
Successfully cracking each layer triggers a system override, granting you additional attempts and operational time. To close the case, you must clear all 3 layers and reach the final core sequence.

Your SIA performance is analyzed live via 5 core neural pillars: Precision, Velocity, Stability, Intuition, and Convergence. Each pillar generates up to 100 POINTS based on efficiency. An Elite rank requires absolute logic and agility.

Faulty maneuvers disrupt neural synchronization and degrade your rank:

• MEMORY ERROR: Repeating previous guesses.
• ARCHIVE DEPENDENCY: Over-reliance on logs.
• LOGICAL ERRORS: Inputs that contradict established data.

This game was created without any commercial purpose — a gift for brain health. Its mission: to fight the attention deficit and brain rot fuelled by social media by training short-term memory, strengthening analytical intelligence, and sharpening focus and concentration.

There are no ads in this game. The reason is simple: ads are one of the very triggers of brain rot.

If you enjoyed the game, you can support its mission on Patreon 🧡
This combination has already been tried. Try a different sequence. (No points or attempts deducted)
All digits in the code must be unique. Review your sequence. (No points or attempts deducted)
Enables color-coded logic feedback for each digit in the interrogation log.

plurals.name: report_promotion_msg
plurals.item: Level %1$d reached. You gained %2$d extra attempt and %3$d bonus seconds. Ready for the next phase?
Level %1$d reached. You gained %2$d extra attempts and %3$d bonus seconds. Ready for the next phase?

plurals.name: report_compromised_msg
plurals.item: Wrong sequence! Security is tightening. You have %d attempt remaining.
Wrong sequence! Security is tightening. You have %d attempts remaining.

resources.string: The countdown has been halted. Your current intelligence is preserved.
COGNITIVE SYNC: OPTIMAL. PATTERN RECOGNITION WITHIN EXPECTED PARAMETERS.
COGNITIVE SYNC: STABLE. NEURAL COMPREHENSION IS WITHIN SECURE RANGE.
COGNITIVE SYNC: STANDARD. OPERATIONAL STABILITY MAINTAINED AT BASE LEVEL.
COGNITIVE SYNC: SUB-OPTIMAL. SIGNAL NOISE DETECTED. SYSTEM OVERHEAD OBSERVED.
COGNITIVE SYNC: CRITICAL. NEURAL CALIBRATION RECOMMENDED FOR NEXT PHASE.
The Neural Diagnostic Engine evaluates your cognitive performance across 5 specific pillars. Understanding these protocols is essential for achieving the Elite rank in the SIA files.

Evaluates the purity of your deduction and operational sharpness. Any guess that contradicts established data or provides zero new intelligence is logged as "signal waste" and degrades your precision rank. Every move must represent absolute logical progression.

Measures your synaptic processing speed and decision-making under pressure. The timer is the primary evaluation variable of the DA-7 engine. Decoding layers in record time triggers neural overdrive bonuses, maximizing your point output.

Tracks mental focus and short-term memory consistency. Repeating a previous guess (Duplicate Error) or making erratic entries outside the logical sequence causes heavy destabilization of the neural wave. A stable mind is the foundation of SIA protocols.

Measures raw pattern recognition without system assistance. Frequent reliance on the Interrogation Logs suggests lower intuitive capacity. Decoding the sequence with minimal log interaction will elevate your intuition to the maximum rank.

Analyzes the efficiency of your code narrowing strategy. Each guess should strategically converge towards the mathematical core. Drifting patterns or outlier attempts indicate a loss of logical cohesion and operational efficiency.

Number Detective is a cognitive puzzle game built with privacy in mind.

This application does NOT collect, store, or share any personal information, usage data, or device identifiers.

There are no advertisements, analytics trackers, or third-party SDKs that collect data within the app. All your game progress and high scores are saved locally on your device.
